title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at FarmERP South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at FarmERP South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Join the FarmERP South Asia Partners family as a Frontend Developer in Navi Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About FarmERP South Asia Partners:
FarmERP South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FarmERP South Asia Partners!
